title: Onboarding Guide
content: Welcome to EvolveCorp. This guide covers the basics of our culture and systems. Please ensure you have completed your profile on the HR portal.

title: Coding Standards
content: We follow clean code principles. Use descriptive naming, keep functions small, and always write tests for new features. We use TypeScript for all projects.

title: Incident Response Plan
content: In case of a security breach, notify the security team immediately. Do not disclose details to external parties without approval from the Legal department.

title: Remote Work Policy
content: Employees are eligible for up to 3 days of remote work per week. Ensure your home office meets our safety and security requirements.

title: Deployment Pipeline
content: Our CI/CD pipeline runs on GitHub Actions. All PRs must pass linting and unit tests before they can be merged into the main branch.
